heroHeadline: Bad Bunny: Grammy Album of the Year, Super Bowl Headliner, 30 Songs at 1 Billion Streams
heroSubtitle: Tracking the rise from SoundCloud uploads in Vega Baja to 100 billion Spotify streams, 30 individual songs crossing 1 billion streams, and a historic Super Bowl halftime performance. World tour European leg begins May 22, 2026 in Barcelona.
footerNote: Data sourced from Rimas Entertainment, Billboard, Spotify Newsroom, RIAA, Latin Recording Academy, Recording Academy, and major media
